title: Capsule inspection + suppression IPC (Tauri commands) for operator panel
goal: Expose Tauri IPC commands so the operator panel (cluster X UI surfaces) can list recent capsules, inspect a capsule by id, and suppress an individual capsule or item per HBR-INT-006 ('source-linked, inspectable, suppressible'). Commands are read+suppress only on this surface; rebuilds happen through the canonical CapsuleBuilder path.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/ipc.rs registering Tauri commands `kernel.memory_capsule.list_recent`, `kernel.memory_capsule.get`, `kernel.memory_capsule.suppress_item`, `kernel.memory_capsule.suppress_capsule`. Wiring into app/src-tauri/src/main.rs (command registration only). Tests under src/backend/handshake_core/tests/memory_ipc_tests.rs.
implementation_notes: Per HBR-INT-006 retrieval policy + audit log must be inspectable; per AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW any capsule entering the loop must support content review. Tauri command signatures: `list_recent(limit: u32) -> Vec<CapsuleSummary>`, `get(capsule_id: Uuid) -> CapsuleRecord`, `suppress_item(capsule_id: Uuid, item_id: Uuid, reason: String) -> SuppressionReceipt`, `suppress_capsule(capsule_id: Uuid, reason: String) -> SuppressionReceipt`. CapsuleSummary: `{ capsule_id, task_type, built_at_utc, included_count, suppressed_count, has_outcome }`. Suppression flows through KernelActionCatalogV1 (CapsuleSuppression action variant) so the operator suppression is durable + audit-trail-bearing. Suppression emits `FR-EVT-CAPSULE-SUPPRESSED` via FEMS flight recorder. Tests: list_recent returns ordered by built_at_utc desc and respects limit; get returns full record with audit_log; suppress_item updates ONLY that entry's included flag + reason; suppress_capsule marks all entries suppressed; commands fail cleanly on unknown capsule_id; commands DO NOT bypass the catalog (mock catalog records every suppression).
risk_if_missed: Without inspect+suppress IPC the operator cannot honor HBR-INT-006 inspectability requirement; a poisoning capsule has no operator escape hatch.
validator_focus: All IPC suppressions flow through KernelActionCatalogV1; commands are pure projections (list/get) or audit-bearing mutations (suppress).

minimum_controls: Suppression always flows through KernelActionCatalogV1; no direct DB writes.
list_recent + get are read-only projections; cannot mutate state.
Every suppression emits an FR-EVT-CAPSULE-SUPPRESSED flight recorder event so audit trail is complete.
